zh.lifeSummary: 當Chevalier Enguerrand de Brimeu於大約1150年5月6日出生在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯布利時，他的父親Radulf de Brimeu27歲，母親Blanche de Montgomery de Ponthieu28歲。他與Elisabeth DE CREQUY結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他於1187年登記服兵役。他去世於大約1204年1月28日享年53歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Brimeu
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: probably a variant, via Brimner, of the ethnic name Bremner , denoting someone from Brabant in the Low Countries.

variants.name: Bremner
meanings: Scottish: habitational name for someone from Brabant in the Low Countries, from Older Scots Brebner, Brabanare ‘native or inhabitant of Brabant’ (see Brabant and compare with the synonymous Brabazon ). Weavers from Brabant settled early at Aberdeen and on the east coast of Scotland.
German: habitational name for someone from the city of Bremen. This surname is very rare in Germany.

en.lifeSummary: When Chevalier Enguerrand de Brimeu was born about 6 May 1150, in Brimeux, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, his father, Radulf de Brimeu, was 27 and his mother, Blanche de Montgomery de Ponthieu, was 28. He married Elisabeth DE CREQUY. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 7 daughters. He registered for military service in 1187. He died about 28 January 1204, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Chevalier Enguerrand de Brimeu est né environ 6 mai 1150, à Brimeux, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Radulf de Brimeu, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Blanche de Montgomery de Ponthieu, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Elisabeth DE CREQUY. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 7 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1187. Il est décédé environ 28 janvier 1204, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Chevalier Enguerrand de Brimeu um 6. Mai 1150 in Brimeux, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Radulf de Brimeu 27 und seine Mutter Blanche de Montgomery de Ponthieu 28. Er hat Elisabeth DE CREQUY geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er hat sich 1187 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb um 28. Januar 1204 im Alter von 53 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Chevalier Enguerrand de Brimeu è nato il circa 6 maggio 1150 nel Brimeux, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, il suo padre, Radulf de Brimeu, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Blanche de Montgomery de Ponthieu, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Elisabeth DE CREQUY. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 7 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1187. Morì circa 28 gennaio 1204, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Chevalier Enguerrand de Brimeuが約1150年5月6日にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスブリメウックスで生まれた時，父Radulf de Brimeuは27歳，母Blanche de Montgomery de Ponthieuは28歳であった。Elisabeth DE CREQUYと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1187年に兵役登録をした。彼は約1204年1月28日に53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Chevalier Enguerrand de Brimeu(이)가 대략 1150년 5월 6일 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 브라임우스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Radulf de Brimeu(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Blanche de Montgomery de Ponthieu(은)는 28세였다. 그는 Elisabeth DE CREQUY(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1187년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 대략 1204년 1월 28일 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.ABT 06 MAY 1150–Abt 21 Jan 1204: aproximadamente 6 de maio de 1150–aproximadamente 28 de janeiro de 1204
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Chevalier Enguerrand de Brimeu nasceu aproximadamente 6 de maio de 1150, em Brimeux, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, seu pai, Radulf de Brimeu, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Blanche de Montgomery de Ponthieu, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Elisabeth DE CREQUY. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1187. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 28 de janeiro de 1204, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Chevalier Enguerrand de Brimeu родился около 6 мая 1150 г. в местности бримеукс, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция, его отцу по имени Radulf de Brimeu было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Blanche de Montgomery de Ponthieu, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Elisabeth DE CREQUY. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 7 дочерей. В 1187 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер около 28 января 1204 г. в возрасте 53 лет.

es.ABT 06 MAY 1150–Abt 21 Jan 1204: aproximadamente 6 de mayo de 1150–aproximadamente 28 de enero de 1204
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Chevalier Enguerrand de Brimeu nació aproximadamente 6 de mayo de 1150, en Brimeux, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, su papá, Radulf de Brimeu, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Blanche de Montgomery de Ponthieu, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Elisabeth DE CREQUY. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 7 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1187. Murió aproximadamente 28 de enero de 1204, a la edad de 53 años.
